name: Clock Arc
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>変</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>咎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> クロックアーク
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If you control no monsters, or only Pendulum Monsters, apply this effect, based on this card's Pendulum Zone.
● Left: Reduce its Pendulum Scale by 3.
● Right: Increase its Pendulum Scale by 4.
During your opponent's Standby Phase: You can Special Summon this card.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is Special Summoned to a zone that is not the center Main Monster Zone, destroy it. Cannot be destroyed by battle. Once per turn, during your opponent's End Phase: You can target 1 card in your Pendulum Zone; destroy it, and if you do, place this card in your Pendulum Zone.
pend_eff:

eff: If this card is Special Summoned to a zone that is not the center Main Monster Zone, destroy it. Cannot be destroyed by battle. Once per turn, during your opponent's End Phase: You can target 1 card in your Pendulum Zone; destroy it, and if you do, place this card in your Pendulum Zone.

action: Places from field to Pendulum Zone
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Pendulum Zone
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
